Uses of Interface
high.mackenzie.snowflake.ITreeNode

Uses of ITreeNode in high.mackenzie.snowflake
 

Classes in high.mackenzie.snowflake that implement ITreeNode
 class AbstractTreeNode
          An instance of this class is a node in a syntax-tree.
 class TreeNode
          An instance of this class is a node in the parse-tree data-structure created via parsing.
 

Methods in high.mackenzie.snowflake that return ITreeNode
 ITreeNode AbstractTreeNode.childAt(int index)
          This method returns the child-node of this node at a given index.
 ITreeNode ITreeNode.childAt(int index)
          This method returns the child-node of this node at a given index.
abstract  ITreeNode[] AbstractTreeNode.children()
          This method returns an array that contains the children of this node.
 ITreeNode[] ITreeNode.children()
          This method returns an array that contains the children of this node.
static ITreeNode AbstractTreeNode.find(java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterable, java.lang.String name)
          This method searches an iterable for a particular tree-node.
 ITreeNode ParserOutput.parseTree()
          This method retrieves and returns the parse-tree created by this parser.
 

Methods in high.mackenzie.snowflake that return types with arguments of type ITreeNode
static java.util.List<ITreeNode> AbstractTreeNode.findAll(java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterable, java.lang.String name)
          This method searches an iterable for a particular group of tree-nodes.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> AbstractTreeNode.iterableBFS()
          This method returns a breadth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> ITreeNode.iterableBFS()
          This method returns a breadth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> TreeNode.iterableBFS()
          This method returns a breadth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> AbstractTreeNode.iterableDFS()
          This method returns a depth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> ITreeNode.iterableDFS()
          This method returns a depth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> TreeNode.iterableDFS()
          This method returns a depth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> AbstractTreeNode.iterableLeavesFirst()
          This method returns a leaves-first iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> ITreeNode.iterableLeavesFirst()
          This method returns a leaves-first iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> TreeNode.iterableLeavesFirst()
          This method returns a leaves-first iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.util.Iterator<ITreeNode> AbstractTreeNode.iterator()
          This method returns a depth-first-search iterator over the tree rooted at this node.
 java.util.Iterator<ITreeNode> ITreeNode.iterator()
          This method returns a depth-first-search iterator over the tree rooted at this node.
 

Methods in high.mackenzie.snowflake with parameters of type ITreeNode
 void ITreeNodeVisitor.visit(ITreeNode node)
          This method performs the visitation of a given node in a syntax-tree.
 void ITreeNodeVisitor.visitUnknown(ITreeNode node)
          This method is invoked by the visit(ITreeNode) method, if the method does not recognize the node that it is attempting to visit.
 

Method parameters in high.mackenzie.snowflake with type arguments of type ITreeNode
static ITreeNode AbstractTreeNode.find(java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterable, java.lang.String name)
          This method searches an iterable for a particular tree-node.
static java.util.List<ITreeNode> AbstractTreeNode.findAll(java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterable, java.lang.String name)
          This method searches an iterable for a particular group of tree-nodes.
